title: Contact page
body:
Build /contact/ page.

Layout: page
page_ident: CONTACT

- Contact form (name, email, message fields)
- Form POSTs to Flask /contact endpoint (Milestone 5)
- Friendly intro copy — not just a cold form
- Note about response time
- Letterbird embed removed, replaced with native form

title: Newsletter signup page
body:
Build /subscribe/ page.

Layout: page
page_ident: STAY IN THE LOOP

- Brief friendly intro (what they are signing up for, no spam promise, unsubscribe anytime)
- Name and email fields
- Channel checkboxes:
    New products
    Restocks
    Matches
    Leather goods
    Journal (new posts)
- Submit button
- Form POSTs to Flask /subscribe endpoint (Milestone 5)
- Success state copy

Also: subscribe teaser section on home page links here with a single email field quick-signup.

title: Shop index page
body:
Build /shop/ index page.

Layout: shop
page_ident: THE SHOP · MATCHES & LEATHER

- Intro copy (brief, 1-2 sentences)
- Product grid renders all _products/ entries
- Simple category filter: All , Matches , Leather Goods (CSS-only show/hide or minimal JS — no framework)
- Out-of-stock products still show, badge indicates status
- Featured products appear first (sort by featured: true in front matter)

title: Cart state in JavaScript
body:
Build cart.js — vanilla JS, no framework.

Responsibilities:
- Maintain cart state (items, quantities, totals) in memory
- Add to cart, remove from cart, update quantity
- Open/close cart drawer
- Update cart icon count badge
- Persist cart to sessionStorage so it survives page navigation but clears when browser closes
- Render cart items in drawer
- Calculate and display subtotal

No Stripe calls in this file — that happens at checkout button click.
Lives in assets/js/cart.js

title: Flask /create-checkout route
body:
Build the /create-checkout POST endpoint in Flask.

Accepts: JSON cart payload (items, quantities, customer email)
Actions:
- Validate cart contents against known products/prices
- Create Stripe Payment Intent via Stripe API
- Return client_secret to browser

Security:
- Validate all prices server-side — never trust client-sent prices
- CORS restricted to bestcigarmatches.com

File: routes/checkout.py

title: Stripe.js payment form
body:
Integrate Stripe.js payment form into checkout flow.

- Load Stripe.js from Stripe CDN (never self-host)
- On checkout button click: POST cart to /create-checkout, receive client_secret
- Mount Stripe Elements payment form (card number, expiry, CVC, billing zip)
- Style Elements to match design system (burgundy focus states, parchment/dark backgrounds)
- Handle payment submission
- On success: redirect to /order-confirmed/
- On failure: display error message inline, allow retry
- Test thoroughly with Stripe test card numbers

title: Flask /webhook route
body:
Build the Stripe webhook handler in Flask.

- Register /webhook endpoint with Stripe dashboard
- Verify webhook signature (Stripe-Signature header) — reject anything that does not verify
- Handle payment_intent.succeeded event:
    - Write order record to orders.json
    - Send order confirmation email to customer
    - Send order notification email to Aaron
- Handle payment_intent.payment_failed event:
    - Log failure
- Return 200 quickly

File: routes/webhooks.py

title: End-to-end checkout test
body:
Full checkout flow test in Stripe test mode before switching to live.

Test scenarios:
- Add single item, complete checkout
- Add multiple items, complete checkout
- Remove item from cart, complete checkout
- Payment failure (use Stripe test decline card)
- Webhook receipt confirmed in Flask logs
- Order record written to orders.json
- Customer confirmation email received
- Aaron notification email received
- Redirect to /order-confirmed/ working
- Cart clears after successful checkout

title: Contact form front end
body:
Wire up the contact page form to Flask /contact.

- Form submits via fetch() (no page reload)
- Loading state on button while submitting
- Success state: inline confirmation message
- Error state: inline error message, allow retry
- No page redirect on success — keep it smooth

title: SEO configuration
body:
Complete SEO setup via jekyll-seo-tag and _config.yml.

_config.yml fields to complete:
- title: Best Cigar Matches
- description: (write compelling 150-char description)
- author: Aaron Aiken
- twitter/social handles if applicable

Per-page:
- Confirm title and description front matter on all key pages
- Open Graph image created and set (1200x630, derive from logo/brand)

Confirm jekyll-sitemap generates sitemap.xml correctly.
Submit sitemap to Google Search Console post-launch.

title: Production smoke test
body:
Final smoke test on production domain after DNS resolves.

Critical paths:
- Home page loads correctly on bestcigarmatches.com
- SSL padlock present
- Shop loads, products display
- Add to cart works
- Checkout completes (real card, small amount, refund after)
- Order confirmation email arrives
- Contact form works
- Subscribe form works
- All pages load without console errors
- Dark mode works on production
- Mobile loads correctly on production
